description: Modules for abstracting Electron APIs like IPC, File System, and Window controls, with browser-compatible fallbacks.

modules.name: ipc-wrapper
modules.description: A type-safe wrapper for Electron's ipcRenderer with a mock implementation for web debugging.

functions.name: ipc.send
functions.description: Sends an asynchronous message to the main process via `channel`, along with arguments.

functions.name: ipc.invoke
functions.description: Sends a message to the main process and waits for a response (Promise).

functions.name: ipc.on
functions.description: Listens to `channel`, when a new message arrives `listener` would be called.

functions.name: ipc.off
functions.description: Removes the specified `listener` from the listener array for the specified `channel`.

modules.name: window-shell-utils
modules.description: Utilities for managing application windows and shell operations.

functions.name: windowControls.minimize
functions.description: Minimizes the current window via IPC.

functions.name: windowControls.maximize
functions.description: Maximizes or unmaximizes the current window via IPC.

functions.name: windowControls.close
functions.description: Closes the current window via IPC.

functions.name: shellUtils.openExternal
functions.description: Opens the given external protocol URL in the desktop's default manner.

modules.name: fs-wrapper
modules.description: A bridge for Node.js file system operations via IPC, with a local storage fallback for web.

functions.name: fs.readFile
functions.description: Reads the contents of a file.

functions.name: fs.writeFile
functions.description: Writes data to a file, replacing the file if it already exists.

functions.name: fs.exists
functions.description: Checks if a file or directory exists.

functions.name: fs.readdir
functions.description: Reads the contents of a directory.

modules.name: dialog-manager
modules.description: A comprehensive wrapper for native system dialogs (Open, Save, Message, Error) with browser fallbacks.

functions.name: dialog.showOpenDialog
functions.description: Opens a dialog to select files or directories.

functions.name: dialog.showSaveDialog
functions.description: Opens a dialog to save a file.

functions.name: dialog.showMessageBox
functions.description: Shows a native message box.

functions.name: dialog.showErrorBox
functions.description: Displays a modal dialog that shows an error message.

functions.name: dialog.confirm
functions.description: A convenience method to show a Yes/No confirmation dialog.

functions.name: dialog.showAboutPanel
functions.description: Displays the standard 'About' panel for the application.

modules.name: clipboard-extended
modules.description: Clipboard operations supporting text, images, HTML, and format inspection.

functions.name: clipboard.writeText
functions.description: Writes text to the clipboard.

functions.name: clipboard.readText
functions.description: Reads text from the clipboard.

functions.name: clipboard.writeImage
functions.description: Writes an image (Data URL) to the clipboard.

functions.name: clipboard.readImage
functions.description: Reads an image from the clipboard as a Data URL.

functions.name: clipboard.writeHTML
functions.description: Writes HTML markup (and optional plain text fallback) to the clipboard.

functions.name: clipboard.readHTML
functions.description: Reads HTML content from the clipboard.

functions.name: clipboard.clear
functions.description: Clears the clipboard content.

functions.name: clipboard.availableFormats
functions.description: Returns an array of supported formats currently available in the clipboard.

modules.name: system-info
modules.description: Utilities to retrieve system information like screen size, battery, cursor position, and OS details.

functions.name: sysInfo.getPlatform
functions.description: Returns the OS platform (win32, darwin, linux, or web-browser).

functions.name: sysInfo.getDisplays
functions.description: Returns information about connected displays.

functions.name: sysInfo.getBatteryStatus
functions.description: Returns battery level and charging status.

functions.name: sysInfo.getCursorPosition
functions.description: Returns the current mouse cursor position in global screen coordinates.

functions.name: sysInfo.isDarkMode
functions.description: Checks if the system is currently in Dark Mode.

functions.name: sysInfo.getProcessMemoryInfo
functions.description: Returns memory usage statistics for the current process.

functions.name: sysInfo.getAppVersion
functions.description: Returns the version of the running application.

modules.name: menu-manager
modules.description: Manages application and context menus, allowing dynamic updates to menu items.

functions.name: menu.setApplicationMenu
functions.description: Sets the application's top-level menu.

functions.name: menu.showContextMenu
functions.description: Shows a context menu at the specified position.

functions.name: menu.updateMenuItem
functions.description: Updates a menu item by ID with new properties (e.g., label, checked, enabled).

functions.name: menu.getMenuItemById
functions.description: Retrieves the current state of a menu item by its ID.

functions.name: menu.closePopup
functions.description: Closes the currently open context menu.

modules.name: tray-manager
modules.description: Manages the system tray icon, including tooltips, context menus, and notification balloons.

functions.name: tray.create
functions.description: Creates a tray icon.

functions.name: tray.setImage
functions.description: Changes the tray icon image.

functions.name: tray.setContextMenu
functions.description: Sets the context menu for the tray icon.

functions.name: tray.setToolTip
functions.description: Updates the tooltip of the tray icon.

functions.name: tray.setTitle
functions.description: Sets the title displayed next to the tray icon in the status bar (macOS only).

functions.name: tray.displayBalloon
functions.description: Displays a system tray balloon notification (Windows).
params: options: { title: string, content: string, iconType?: 'none'|'info'|'warning'|'error' }

functions.name: tray.getBounds
functions.description: Returns the bounds (x, y, width, height) of the tray icon.
functions.returns: Promise<{x: number, y: number, width: number, height: number}>

functions.name: tray.destroy
functions.description: Removes the tray icon.

modules.name: taskbar-utils
modules.description: Utilities for controlling the application's appearance in the OS taskbar or dock, including overlays and recent docs.

functions.name: taskbar.setProgressBar
functions.description: Sets the progress bar value on the taskbar icon (0 to 1, or -1 to clear).

functions.name: taskbar.setBadgeCount
functions.description: Sets the badge count on the dock icon (macOS/Linux).

functions.name: taskbar.setOverlayIcon
functions.description: Sets a small overlay icon on the taskbar button (Windows).

functions.name: taskbar.setThumbnailTooltip
functions.description: Sets the toolip text displayed when hovering over the taskbar thumbnail (Windows).

functions.name: taskbar.flashFrame
functions.description: Flashes the window title bar or taskbar button to gain attention.

functions.name: taskbar.addRecentDocument
functions.description: Adds a file path to the Recent Documents list in the taskbar jump list.

functions.name: taskbar.clearRecentDocuments
functions.description: Clears the Recent Documents list.

modules.name: global-shortcut
modules.description: Registers global keyboard shortcuts that work even when the application does not have focus.

functions.name: globalShortcut.register
functions.description: Registers a global shortcut.

functions.name: globalShortcut.unregister
functions.description: Unregisters a specific global shortcut.

functions.name: globalShortcut.unregisterAll
functions.description: Unregisters all global shortcuts registered by the application.

functions.name: globalShortcut.isRegistered
functions.description: Checks if a given accelerator is registered.

modules.name: power-monitor
modules.description: Monitors power state changes (suspend, resume, AC/battery).

functions.name: powerMonitor.on
functions.description: Adds a listener for a power event.

functions.name: powerMonitor.off
functions.description: Removes a listener for a power event.

modules.name: desktop-capturer
modules.description: Accesses available media sources (screens and windows) for capture.

functions.name: desktopCapturer.getSources
functions.description: Returns a list of screen and window sources available for capture.
params: options: { types: Array<'screen' | 'window'>, thumbnailSize?: {width: number, height: number} }

modules.name: web-frame
modules.description: Customize the rendering of the current web page (zoom level, etc.).

functions.name: webFrame.setZoomFactor
functions.description: Changes the zoom factor of the specified page.

functions.name: webFrame.getZoomFactor
functions.description: Returns the current zoom factor.

functions.name: webFrame.setVisualZoomLevelLimits
functions.description: Sets the maximum and minimum pinch-to-zoom level.

modules.name: auto-updater
modules.description: Manages checking for updates and installing them.

functions.name: autoUpdater.checkForUpdates
functions.description: Asks the server whether there is an update.

functions.name: autoUpdater.quitAndInstall
functions.description: Restarts the app and installs the update.

functions.name: autoUpdater.on
functions.description: Adds a listener for update events (update-available, download-progress, etc.).

modules.name: power-save-blocker
modules.description: Prevents the system from entering sleep mode.

functions.name: powerSaveBlocker.start
functions.description: Starts blocking system suspend.

functions.name: powerSaveBlocker.stop
functions.description: Stops a specified blocker.

functions.name: powerSaveBlocker.isStarted
functions.description: Checks if a blocker ID is active.

modules.name: native-image
modules.description: Creates tray, dock, and application icons using PNG or JPG files.

functions.name: nativeImage.createFromPath
functions.description: Creates a new NativeImage instance from a file path.

functions.name: nativeImage.createFromDataURL
functions.description: Creates a new NativeImage instance from a data URL.

functions.name: image.toDataURL
functions.description: Returns the data URL of the image.

functions.name: image.resize
functions.description: Resizes the image and returns a new NativeImage instance.
params: options: { width?: number, height?: number, quality?: 'good'|'better'|'best' }

modules.name: crash-reporter
modules.description: Submits crash reports to a remote server.

functions.name: crashReporter.start
functions.description: Enables the crash reporter.

functions.name: crashReporter.getLastCrashReport
functions.description: Returns the date and ID of the last crash report.

functions.name: crashReporter.getUploadedReports
functions.description: Returns all uploaded crash reports.

functions.name: crashReporter.addExtraParameter
functions.description: Adds an extra parameter to be sent with the crash report.
